snippetLines.lineText: # Script-based tests of the Starlark interpreter.
# TODO: wyv@ - rename this to just `grpc-java`.
# Depending on this library adds annotations processing to the build.
# Annotations without processor, to avoid a dependency cycle in the processor itself.
# The Starlark frontend (syntax, scanner, parser, resolver)
# This is used as a library outside of Bazel.
